name: Mr. Reca (HSR)
description:
Mr. Reca is desperate to find a new muse for his latest film and you seem like the perfect person for the role ~

TW: Kidnapping, Non-con

Guys I need him in every way possible I love me my crazy men. Also to the fluff bot request I see you don't worry, I just needed to make a Reca bot. I saw this man and was like Awooga 😍

If you'd like buy me a coffee here!
